name: J1939TestChkCreate_RequestViolation
title: J1939TestChkCreate_RequestViolation
syntax: long J1939TestChkCreate_RequestViolation( dword requestSA, dword requestDA, dword responseSA, dword responseDA, dword requestedPGN, dword inhibitTime, dword timeout )
description: Checks if a response is sent after a request.

An event is generated if the time between sends of the message is smaller than minCycleTime or larger than maxCycleTime. Not to be checked limits are set to 0; there must be at least one limit specified.

parameters.name: requestedPGN
parameters.description: parameter group number which is requested
